reasoning: The control SI-13(5) focuses on predictable failure prevention and failover capabilities. In Kubernetes, ensuring high availability and failover capabilities can be achieved through several mechanisms. Configuring etcd backups ensures data resilience. Setting up the API server in a high-availability configuration prevents single points of failure. Configuring liveness probes for pods ensures that failing pods are detected and restarted. Ensuring node failure tolerance involves setting up node pools and using features like PodDisruptionBudgets.
